mapper.sql: distinct aoa.id,aoa.oa_order, aoa.nick_name, aoa.user_name, aoa.overtime_type, aoa.user_department, aoa.user_section, aoa.groups, aoa.reason, aoa.total_number, aoa.total_time, aoa.approval_node, aoa.approval_employee, aoa.approval_result, aoa.enabled_flag, aoa.attribute1, aoa.attribute2, aoa.attribute3, aoa.attribute4, aoa.attribute5, aoa.create_by, aoa.create_time

select
from ac_overtime_application aoa inner join ac_overtime_application_line aoal on aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order

where 1 = 1
and (aoa.user_name = #{criteria.user_name} or aoal.user_name = #{criteria.user_name})
and aoa.approval_result = #{criteria.approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and aoal.start_time BETWEEN #{criteria.beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} and #{criteria.endDate, jdbcType = DATE}
and 1 = 1
and (aoa.approval_result = 'pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'Cancel' or aoa.approval_result ='notPass' or aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' )
and aoa.approval_result IS NULL
mapper.insert: insert into ac_overtime_application (oa_order, nick_name, user_name, overtime_type, user_department, user_section, groups, reason, total_number, total_time, approval_node, approval_employee, approval_result, enabled_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_by, create_time) values (#{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{overtimeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userSection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groups,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalTime,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into ac_overtime_application(oa_order, nick_name, user_name, user_department, user_section, groups, reason, total_number, total_time, create_by, create_time, enabled_flag) values (#{oa_order}, #{nick_name}, #{user_name}, #{user_department}, #{user_section}, #{groups}, #{reason}, #{total_number}, #{total_time}, #{create_by}, GETDATE(), 1)

INSERT INTO ac_overtime_application_line (oa_order, nick_name, user_name, position, start_time, end_time, total_rest_time, hours, month_hours, create_by, create_time, enabled_flag) VALUES
(#{item.oa_order}, #{item.name}, #{item.work_card}, #{item.job_name}, #{item.start_time}, #{item.end_time}, #{item.total_rest_time}, #{item.hours}, #{item.month_hours}, #{item.create_by}, GETDATE(),1)
insert into ac_overtime_personnel_review(dept_id, section_id, work_card, create_by, create_time) values (#{dept_id}, #{section_id}, #{work_card}, #{create_by}, GETDATE())
mapper.update: update ac_overtime_application set oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, overtime_type = #{overtimeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_department = #{userDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_section = #{userSection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, groups = #{groups,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_number = #{totalNumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_time = #{totalTime,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, approval_node = #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_employee = #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_result = #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update.foreach: update ac_overtime_application_line set month_hours = #{item.month_hours}, review_startTime = #{item.review_startTime}, review_endTime = #{item.review_endTime}, review_total_rest_time = #{item.review_total_rest_time}, review_hours = #{item.review_hours}, reviewer_nick_name = #{item.reviewer_nick_name}, reviewer_user_name = #{item.reviewer_user_name}, remarks = #{item.remarks}, review_time = GETDATE() where user_name = #{item.work_card} and oa_order = #{item.oa_order}

mapper.select: where aoa.id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
order by id

SELECT pej.job_name, pej.dept_id, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pe.work_card, pe.name FROM pm_employee_job pej LEFT JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = pej.dept_id where pej.dept_id = #{deptId} and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

SELECT sum(ROUND(aoal.hours, 2)) as month_hours FROM ac_overtime_application_line aoal left join ac_overtime_application aoa on aoal.oa_order = aoa.oa_order WHERE aoal.user_name = #{tempCard} AND MONTH ( aoal.start_time) = MONTH (GETDATE()) AND YEAR (aoal.start_time) = YEAR (GETDATE()) AND (aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'pass' OR aoa.approval_result is null)
select TOP 1 * from ac_overtime_mangement_backup where dept_id = #{deptId} AND MONTH (backup_time) = MONTH (GETDATE()) AND YEAR (backup_time) = YEAR (GETDATE())

-- SELECT SUM(aoal.month_hours) used_month_hours SELECT SUM(aoal.hours) used_month_hours FROM ac_overtime_application_line aoal inner join ac_overtime_application aoa on aoal.oa_order = aoa.oa_order WHERE MONTH (aoal.start_time) = MONTH (GETDATE()) AND YEAR (aoal.create_time) = YEAR (GETDATE()) AND aoal.user_name IN (SELECT work_card FROM pm_employee_job pej inner JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id=pe.id inner JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id=pej.dept_id where pej.dept_id= #{deptId} and pe.leave_flag=0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1) AND (aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'pass' OR aoa.approval_result is null)

SELECT * FROM ac_overtime_application_line aoal join ac_overtime_application aoa on aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order where aoal.user_name = #{workCard} AND (aoa.approval_result like 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result is null or aoa.approval_result = 'pass') AND ( (aoal.start_time >= #{startTime} AND aoal.start_time <= #{endTime}) OR (aoal.start_time <= #{startTime} AND aoal.end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (aoal.end_time >= #{startTime} AND aoal.end_time <= #{endTime}) )

SELECT TOP 1 * FROM ac_overtime_application_line aoal join ac_overtime_application aoa on aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order where aoal.user_name = #{workCard} AND (aoa.approval_result like 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result is null or aoa.approval_result = 'pass') AND ( (aoal.start_time >= #{startTime} AND aoal.start_time <= #{endTime}) OR (aoal.start_time <= #{startTime} AND aoal.end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (aoal.end_time >= #{startTime} AND aoal.end_time <= #{endTime}) )

select distinct nick_name,user_name,position,start_time,end_time,total_rest_time,hours,month_hours,review_startTime,review_endTime, review_total_rest_time,review_hours,reviewer_nick_name,reviewer_user_name,review_time, remarks from ac_overtime_application_line where oa_order = #{oaOrder}
select id as dept_id, dept_name from fnd_dept where dept_level like '%部%' AND enabled_flag = 1
select id as dept_id, dept_name from fnd_dept where parent_id = #{parentId} AND dept_level like '%科室%'

SELECT pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card, fd.dept_name as dept_name, aopr.id, aopr.dept_id, aopr.section_id FROM ac_overtime_personnel_review aopr JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = aopr.dept_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.work_card = aopr.work_card WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 and aopr.section_id is not null

SELECT pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card, fd.dept_name as dept_name, aopr.id, aopr.dept_id, aopr.section_id FROM ac_overtime_personnel_review aopr JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = aopr.dept_id JOIN fnd_dept fd2 ON fd2.id = aopr.section_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.work_card = aopr.work_card WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 and aopr.id = #{id}

SELECT pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card, fd.dept_name as dept_name, aopr.id, aopr.dept_id, aopr.section_id FROM ac_overtime_personnel_review aopr JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = aopr.dept_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.work_card = aopr.work_card WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 AND fd.dept_name like #{value}

SELECT pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card, fd.dept_name as dept_name, aopr.id, aopr.dept_id, aopr.section_id FROM ac_overtime_personnel_review aopr JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = aopr.dept_id JOIN fnd_dept fd2 ON fd2.id = aopr.section_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.work_card = aopr.work_card WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 AND fd2.dept_name like #{value}

SELECT pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card, fd.dept_name as dept_name, aopr.id, aopr.dept_id, aopr.section_id FROM ac_overtime_personnel_review aopr JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = aopr.dept_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.work_card = aopr.work_card WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.work_card like #{value}

SELECT pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card, fd.dept_name as dept_name, aopr.id, aopr.dept_id, aopr.section_id FROM ac_overtime_personnel_review aopr JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = aopr.dept_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.work_card = aopr.work_card WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.name like #{value}

SELECT pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card, fd.dept_name as dept_name, fd2.dept_name as section_name, aopr.id, aopr.dept_id, aopr.section_id FROM ac_overtime_personnel_review aopr JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = aopr.dept_id JOIN fnd_dept fd2 ON fd2.id = aopr.section_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.work_card = aopr.work_card WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.work_card = #{workCard}

select distinct aoa.id, aoa.oa_order, aoa.nick_name, aoa.user_name, aoa.overtime_type, aoa.user_department, aoa.user_section, aoa.groups, aoa.reason, aoa.total_number, aoa.total_time, aoa.approval_node, aoa.approval_employee, aoa.approval_result, aoa.enabled_flag, aoa.attribute1, aoa.attribute2, aoa.attribute3, aoa.attribute4, aoa.attribute5, aoa.create_by, aoa.create_time from ac_overtime_application aoa join ac_overtime_application_line aoal on aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order where 1 = 1 AND (aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'pass') AND aoal.review_endTime IS NULL -- 2025-1-2 开年第一天发现查询跨年的加班申请日期转换出错了，所以使用一下sql AND CONVERT(DATE, aoal.end_time) >= CONVERT(DATE, DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()) - 1, 0)) -- 上一个月的第一天 AND CONVERT(DATE, aoal.end_time) < CONVERT(DATE, DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()) + 2, 0))) -- 下两个月的前一天 -- AND CONVERT(DATE, aoal.end_time) >= CONVERT(DATE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(4), YEAR(GETDATE())) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CONVERT (VARCHAR(2), MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1), 2) + '-01') -- AND CONVERT(DATE, aoal.end_time) < CONVERT(DATE, -- CASE -- WHEN MONTH(GETDATE()) + 2 > 12 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(4), YEAR(GETDATE()) + 1) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(2), (MONTH(GETDATE()) + 2) - 12), 2) + '-01' -- ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(4), YEAR(GETDATE())) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(2), MONTH(GETDATE()) + 2), 2) + '-01' -- END) -- AND ( -- DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1, 1) <= aoal.end_time -- AND aoal.end_time < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()) + 2, 1) -- ) AND ( aoa.user_department LIKE #{userDepartment} AND aoa.user_section LIKE #{userSection} )

select aoa.id, aoa.oa_order, aoa.nick_name, aoa.user_name, aoa.overtime_type, aoa.user_department, aoa.user_section, aoa.groups, aoa.reason, aoa.total_number, aoa.total_time, aoa.approval_node, aoa.approval_employee, aoa.approval_result, aoa.enabled_flag, aoa.attribute1, aoa.attribute2, aoa.attribute3, aoa.attribute4, aoa.attribute5, aoa.create_by, aoa.create_time from ac_overtime_application aoa join ac_overtime_application_line aoal on aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order where 1 = 1 AND (aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'pass') AND aoal.review_endTime IS NULL AND CONVERT(DATE, aoal.end_time) >= CONVERT(DATE, DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()) - 1, 0)) -- 上一个月的第一天 AND CONVERT(DATE, aoal.end_time) < CONVERT(DATE, DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()) + 2, 0))) -- 下两个月的前一天 -- AND CONVERT(DATE, aoal.end_time) >= CONVERT(DATE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(4), YEAR(GETDATE())) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(2), MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1), 2) + '-01') -- AND CONVERT(DATE, aoal.end_time) < CONVERT(DATE, -- CASE -- WHEN MONTH(GETDATE()) + 2 > 12 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(4), YEAR(GETDATE()) + 1) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(2), (MONTH(GETDATE()) + 2) - 12), 2) + '-01' -- ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(4), YEAR(GETDATE())) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(2), MONTH(GETDATE()) + 2), 2) + '-01' -- END) -- AND ( -- DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1, 1) <= aoal.end_time -- AND aoal.end_time < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()) + 2, 1) -- ) AND ( aoa.user_department LIKE #{userDepartment})

SELECT CONCAT(acr.date, ' ', CONVERT(VARCHAR (5), acr.clock_time)) as clockDate, pm.work_card, acr.card_machine_no FROM ac_clock_record acr JOIN pm_employee pm ON acr.employee_id = pm.id WHERE pm.work_card = #{workCard} AND acr.date >= DATEADD(day, -3, #{parsedDate}) -- 后三天 AND acr.date <= #{parsedDate} -- 前三天 order by acr.date, acr.clock_time

SELECT a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, CASE WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' THEN fd2.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' THEN fd1.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%部%' THEN pej.dept_name ELSE NULL -- 或者你可以设置默认值 END AS dept_name, CASE WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' THEN fd1.dept_name WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' OR fd.dept_level LIKE '%部%' THEN '' -- 因为没有明确的section_name ELSE NULL -- 或者你可以设置默认值 END AS section_name, CASE WHEN fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' THEN pej.dept_name ELSE '' -- 对于其他级别，没有group_name END AS group_name, pej.job_name, SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 0 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END) workDayOvertime, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 1 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END), 1) AS restDayOvertime, CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END), 2) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS TXTS, CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) * 7.5, 2) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS TXXS, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '年假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) NJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '事假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) SJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '病假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) BJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '婚假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) CJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '陪产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) PCJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '丧假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) SAJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '工伤假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GSJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '计划生育假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) JHSYJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '公假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '育儿假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) YEJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '护理假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HLJ FROM (SELECT CONVERT (VARCHAR (7), alal.start_time, 120) AS formatted_month, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' or alaL.leave_type = '年假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END as number, -- alal.number, -- ala.total_number, alal.leave_type, 0 AS reviewhours, 99 AS xxrbs FROM ac_leave_application ala JOIN ac_leave_application_line alal ON ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version WHERE YEAR (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND ala.approval_result = 'Pass' and ala.enabled_flag = 1 UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 7 ), aoal.start_time, 120 ) AS formatted_month, aoal.nick_name, aoal.user_name, 0 AS txts, '加班' AS LeaveType, aoal.review_hours, c.XXRBS FROM ac_overtime_application aoa JOIN ac_overtime_application_line aoal ON aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c.RQ, C.XXRBS FROM v_kq_date c ) c ON CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), aoal.review_startTime, 23 ) = c.RQ WHERE YEAR (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' and aoal.enabled_flag = 1) a JOIN pm_employee pe ON a.user_name = pe.work_card LEFT JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = pej.dept_id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd1 ON fd1.id = fd.parent_id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd2 ON fd2.id = fd1.parent_id WHERE pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND ( fd.dept_level LIKE '%班%' OR fd.dept_level LIKE '%科室%' OR fd.dept_level LIKE '%部%' ) AND a.nick_name != '' GROUP BY a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, pej.attribute2, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pej.job_name, fd.dept_level, fd.dept_name, fd1.dept_name, fd2.dept_name order by a.formatted_month desc OFFSET (#{pages}) * #{sizes} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{sizes} ROWS ONLY

SELECT a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_dept_id = fdt.id ) AS dept_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_department_id = fdt.id ) AS section_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_team_id = fdt.id ) AS group_name, pej.job_name, SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 0 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END) workDayOvertime, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 1 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END), 1) AS restDayOvertime, CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END), 2) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS TXTS, CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) * 7.5, 2) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS TXXS, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '年假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) NJ, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '事假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END),2) SJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '病假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) BJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '婚假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) CJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '陪产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) PCJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '丧假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) SAJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '工伤假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GSJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '计划生育假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) JHSYJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '公假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '育儿假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) YEJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '护理假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HLJ FROM (SELECT CONVERT (VARCHAR (7), alal.start_time, 120) AS formatted_month, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, (CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END) AS number, -- COALESCE( -- ala.hr_total, -- 如果 ala.hr_total 不为 NULL，则使用它的值 -- CASE -- WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN -- alal.work_number -- ELSE -- alal.number -- END -- ) AS number, -- CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' or alaL.leave_type = '年假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END as number, -- alal.number, -- ala.total_number, alal.leave_type, 0 AS reviewhours, 99 AS xxrbs FROM ac_leave_application ala JOIN ac_leave_application_line alal ON ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version WHERE YEAR (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND ala.approval_result = 'Pass' and ala.enabled_flag = 1 and ala.enabled_flag = 1 UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 7 ), aoal.start_time, 120 ) AS formatted_month, aoal.nick_name, aoal.user_name, 0 AS txts, '加班' AS LeaveType, ROUND(aoal.review_hours, 1) AS review_hours, -- aoal.review_hours, c.XXRBS FROM ac_overtime_application aoa JOIN ac_overtime_application_line aoal ON aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c.RQ, C.XXRBS FROM v_kq_date c ) c ON CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), aoal.review_startTime, 23 ) = c.RQ WHERE YEAR (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' and aoal.enabled_flag = 1) a JOIN pm_employee pe ON a.user_name = pe.work_card LEFT JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_dept fds ON fds.id = pej.dept_id where (fds.ext_dept_id = #{deptId} AND fds.ext_department_id = #{administrativeOfficeId}) and pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND a.nick_name != '' GROUP BY a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, pej.attribute2, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pej.job_name,fds.ext_dept_id,fds.ext_department_id,fds.ext_team_id order by a.formatted_month desc OFFSET (#{pages}) * #{sizes} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{sizes} ROWS ONLY

SELECT a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_dept_id = fdt.id ) AS dept_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_department_id = fdt.id ) AS section_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_team_id = fdt.id ) AS group_name, pej.job_name, SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 0 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END) workDayOvertime, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 1 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END), 1) AS restDayOvertime, -- ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END), 2) TXTS, -- ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) * 7.5, 2) AS TXXS, CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END), 2) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS TXTS, CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) * 7.5, 2) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS TXXS, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '年假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) NJ, -- ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '事假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END),2) SJ, CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '事假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END),2) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) SJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '病假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) BJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '婚假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) CJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '陪产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) PCJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '丧假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) SAJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '工伤假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GSJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '计划生育假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) JHSYJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '公假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '育儿假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) YEJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '护理假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HLJ FROM (SELECT CONVERT (VARCHAR (7), alal.start_time, 120) AS formatted_month, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, (CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END) AS number, -- COALESCE( -- ala.hr_total, -- 如果 ala.hr_total 不为 NULL，则使用它的值 -- CASE -- WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN -- alal.work_number -- ELSE -- alal.number -- END -- ) AS number, -- CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' or alaL.leave_type = '年假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END as number, -- alal.number, -- ala.total_number, alal.leave_type, 0 AS reviewhours, 99 AS xxrbs FROM ac_leave_application ala JOIN ac_leave_application_line alal ON ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version WHERE YEAR (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND ala.approval_result = 'Pass' and ala.enabled_flag = 1 UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 7 ), aoal.start_time, 120 ) AS formatted_month, aoal.nick_name, aoal.user_name, 0 AS txts, '加班' AS LeaveType, ROUND(aoal.review_hours, 1) AS review_hours, -- aoal.review_hours, c.XXRBS FROM ac_overtime_application aoa JOIN ac_overtime_application_line aoal ON aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c.RQ, C.XXRBS FROM v_kq_date c ) c ON CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), aoal.review_startTime, 23 ) = c.RQ WHERE YEAR (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' and aoal.enabled_flag = 1) a JOIN pm_employee pe ON a.user_name = pe.work_card LEFT JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_dept fds ON fds.id = pej.dept_id WHERE pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND a.nick_name != '' GROUP BY a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, pej.attribute2, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pej.job_name,fds.ext_dept_id,fds.ext_department_id,fds.ext_team_id order by a.formatted_month desc OFFSET (#{pages}) * #{sizes} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{sizes} ROWS ONLY

WITH RankedData AS ( SELECT aoal.oa_order, aoal.user_name, aoal.nick_name, aoal.start_time, aoal.end_time, aoal.hours, aoal.review_startTime, aoal.review_endTime, aoal.review_hours, aoal.reviewer_nick_name, aoal.review_time, aoal.remarks, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY aoal.oa_order, aoal.user_name, aoal.nick_name, aoal.start_time, aoal.end_time, aoal.hours, aoal.review_startTime, aoal.review_endTime, aoal.review_hours, aoal.reviewer_nick_name, aoal.review_time, aoal.remarks ORDER BY aoal.review_time DESC -- 降序排列，以便最新的 review_time 排在前面 ) AS rn FROM ac_overtime_application aoa INNER JOIN ac_overtime_application_line aoal ON aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order WHERE YEAR(aoal.start_time) = CAST(SUBSTRING(#{checkMonth}, 1, 4) AS INT) AND MONTH(aoal.start_time) = CAST(SUBSTRING(#{checkMonth}, 6, 2) AS INT) AND aoal.user_name = #{workCard} AND aoa.enabled_flag = 1 AND aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' ) SELECT distinct oa_order, user_name, nick_name, start_time, end_time, hours, review_startTime, review_endTime, ROUND(review_hours,1) as review_hours, reviewer_nick_name, review_time, remarks FROM RankedData WHERE rn = 1;

select distinct alal.oa_order, ala.nick_name, alal.leave_type, alal.start_time, alal.end_time, COALESCE( ala.hr_total,-- 如果 ala.hr_total 不为 NULL，则使用它的值 CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END ) AS number from ac_leave_application ala left join ac_leave_application_line alal on ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version where ((YEAR (alal.start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (alal.start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT)) or ( FORMAT(alal.start_time, 'yyyy-MM') != FORMAT(alal.end_time, 'yyyy-MM') AND ( FORMAT(alal.start_time, 'yyyy-MM') = #{checkMonth} OR FORMAT(alal.end_time, 'yyyy-MM') = #{checkMonth} OR (FORMAT(alal.start_time, 'yyyy-MM') < #{checkMonth} AND FORMAT(alal.end_time, 'yyyy-MM') > #{checkMonth}) OR (FORMAT(alal.start_time, 'yyyy-MM') = #{checkMonth} AND FORMAT(alal.end_time, 'yyyy-MM') > #{checkMonth}) OR (FORMAT(alal.start_time, 'yyyy-MM') < #{checkMonth} AND FORMAT(alal.end_time, 'yyyy-MM') = #{checkMonth}) ) ) ) and ala.user_name = #{workCard} and ala.enabled_flag = 1 and (ala.approval_result = 'Pass')
select distinct TOP 1 * from ac_overtime_mangement_backup where dept_id = #{deptId} AND MONTH (backup_time) = MONTH (#{endTime}) AND YEAR (backup_time) = YEAR (#{endTime})

SELECT sum(ROUND(aoal.hours, 2)) used_month_hours FROM ac_overtime_application_line aoal left join ac_overtime_application aoa on aoal.oa_order = aoa.oa_order WHERE MONTH (aoal.start_time) = MONTH (#{endTime}) AND YEAR (aoal.create_time) = YEAR (#{endTime}) AND aoal.user_name IN (SELECT work_card FROM pm_employee_job pej LEFT JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id=pe.id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id=pej.dept_id where pej.dept_id= #{deptId} and pe.leave_flag=0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1) AND (aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'pass' OR aoa.approval_result is null)

SELECT pej.job_name, pej.dept_id, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pe.work_card, pe.name FROM pm_employee_job pej LEFT JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = pej.dept_id where fd.parent_id = #{deptId} and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

SELECT pej.job_name, pej.dept_id, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pe.work_card, pe.name FROM pm_employee_job pej LEFT JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = pej.dept_id where fd.parent_id = #{deptId} and pej.attribute4 like #{teamName} and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

SELECT DISTINCT pej.attribute4 as label,pej.attribute4 as value FROM pm_employee_job pej INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = pej.dept_id where fd.parent_id = #{deptId} and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.attribute4 is not null

SELECT COUNT(1) as userNumber FROM fnd_dept fd JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id = pej.dept_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id JOIN fnd_user fu on fu.employee_id = pe.id JOIN fnd_users_roles fur on fur.user_id = fu.id JOIN fnd_role fr on fr.id = fur.role_id WHERE fd.dept_level = '科室' AND fd.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND fd.id = #{deptId} AND fu.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.work_card NOT LIKE '01%' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '业务经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售助理' AND pe.administration_category='NDVC' AND fr.name NOT LIKE '顺特管理层'

SELECT COUNT ( DISTINCT pe.name ) AS userNumber, fd.id, fd.dept_name, pej.attribute1 AS parentName FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id = pej.dept_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_user fu ON fu.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_users_roles fur ON fur.user_id = fu.id INNER JOIN fnd_role fr ON fr.id = fur.role_id WHERE -- (fd.dept_name LIKE #{deptName}) AND ( pej.attribute1 IS NOT NULL OR (pej.attribute1 is NULL AND pej.attribute2 is NULL AND pej.attribute3 is NULL AND pej.attribute4 is NULL AND pej.attribute5 is NULL)) AND fr.name NOT LIKE '顺特管理层' -- AND pe.administration_category= 'NDVC' AND pe.work_card NOT LIKE '01%' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '业务经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售助理' AND pe.leave_flag = 0 GROUP BY fd.id, fd.dept_name, pej.attribute1

SELECT COUNT( distinct pe.work_card ) as userNumber FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id = pej.dept_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_user fu ON fu.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_users_roles fur ON fur.user_id = fu.id INNER JOIN fnd_role fr ON fr.id = fur.role_id WHERE pe.work_card NOT LIKE '01%' AND fr.name NOT LIKE '顺特管理层' -- AND pe.administration_category= 'NDVC' AND pe.work_card NOT LIKE '01%' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '业务经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售经理' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '销售助理' AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.employee_type = '正式员工' AND fd.parent_id = #{dept_id}

select distinct aoa.id, aoa.oa_order, aoa.nick_name, aoa.user_name, aoa.overtime_type, aoa.user_department, aoa.user_section, aoa.groups, aoa.reason, aoa.total_number, aoa.total_time, aoa.approval_node, aoa.approval_employee, aoa.approval_result, aoa.enabled_flag, aoa.attribute1, aoa.attribute2, aoa.attribute3, aoa.attribute4, aoa.attribute5, aoa.create_by, aoa.create_time from ac_overtime_application aoa join ac_overtime_application_line aoal on aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order where 1 = 1 AND (aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'pass') AND aoal.review_endTime IS NULL AND ( aoal.end_time >= DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATEADD(DAY, 1 - DAY(GETDATE()), GETDATE())) AND aoal.end_time < DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATEADD(DAY, 1 - DAY(GETDATE()), GETDATE())) ) AND ( aoa.user_department LIKE #{userDepartment} AND aoa.user_section LIKE #{userSection} )

select aoa.id, aoa.oa_order, aoa.nick_name, aoa.user_name, aoa.overtime_type, aoa.user_department, aoa.user_section, aoa.groups, aoa.reason, aoa.total_number, aoa.total_time, aoa.approval_node, aoa.approval_employee, aoa.approval_result, aoa.enabled_flag, aoa.attribute1, aoa.attribute2, aoa.attribute3, aoa.attribute4, aoa.attribute5, aoa.create_by, aoa.create_time from ac_overtime_application aoa join ac_overtime_application_line aoal on aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order where 1 = 1 AND (aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'pass') AND aoal.review_endTime IS NULL AND ( aoal.end_time >= DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATEADD(DAY, 1 - DAY(GETDATE()), GETDATE())) AND aoal.end_time < DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATEADD(DAY, 1 - DAY(GETDATE()), GETDATE())) ) AND ( aoa.user_department LIKE #{userDepartment})

select distinct aoa.id, aoa.oa_order, aoa.nick_name, aoa.user_name, aoa.overtime_type, aoa.user_department, aoa.user_section, aoa.groups, aoa.reason, aoa.total_number, aoa.total_time, aoa.approval_node, aoa.approval_employee, aoa.approval_result, aoa.enabled_flag, aoa.attribute1, aoa.attribute2, aoa.attribute3, aoa.attribute4, aoa.attribute5, aoa.create_by, aoa.create_time from ac_overtime_application aoa join ac_overtime_application_line aoal on aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order where 1 = 1 AND (aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'pass') AND aoal.review_endTime IS not NULL AND ( aoa.user_department LIKE #{userDepartment} AND aoa.user_section LIKE #{userSection} )

select distinct aoa.id, aoa.oa_order, aoa.nick_name, aoa.user_name, aoa.overtime_type, aoa.user_department, aoa.user_section, aoa.groups, aoa.reason, aoa.total_number, aoa.total_time, aoa.approval_node, aoa.approval_employee, aoa.approval_result, aoa.enabled_flag, aoa.attribute1, aoa.attribute2, aoa.attribute3, aoa.attribute4, aoa.attribute5, aoa.create_by, aoa.create_time from ac_overtime_application aoa join ac_overtime_application_line aoal on aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order where 1 = 1 AND (aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'pass') AND aoal.review_endTime IS not NULL AND ( aoa.user_department LIKE #{userDepartment})

SELECT COUNT ( DISTINCT pe.name ) AS userNumber FROM fnd_dept fd INNER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON fd.id = pej.dept_id INNER JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_user fu ON fu.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_users_roles fur ON fur.user_id = fu.id INNER JOIN fnd_role fr ON fr.id = fur.role_id WHERE fd.id = #{deptId} AND fr.name NOT LIKE '顺特管理层' AND pe.work_card NOT LIKE '01%' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '%业务经理%' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '%销售经理%' AND pej.dept_name NOT LIKE '%销售助理%' AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.employee_type = '正式员工'

SELECT pej.job_name, pej.dept_id, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pe.work_card, pe.name FROM pm_employee_job pej LEFT JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = pej.dept_id where fd.parent_id = #{deptId} and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

SELECT pej.job_name, pej.dept_id, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pe.work_card, pe.name FROM pm_employee_job pej LEFT JOIN pm_employee pe ON pej.employee_id = pe.id LEFT JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = pej.dept_id where fd.parent_id = #{deptId} and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

SELECT a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_dept_id = fdt.id ) AS dept_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_department_id = fdt.id ) AS section_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_team_id = fdt.id ) AS group_name, pej.job_name, SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 0 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END) workDayOvertime, SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 1 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END) restDayOvertime, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END), 2) TXTS, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) * 7.5, 2) AS TXXS, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '年假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) NJ, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '事假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END),2) SJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '病假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) BJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '婚假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) CJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '陪产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) PCJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '丧假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) SAJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '工伤假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GSJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '计划生育假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) JHSYJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '公假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '育儿假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) YEJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '护理假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HLJ FROM (SELECT CONVERT (VARCHAR (7), alal.start_time, 120) AS formatted_month, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, (CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END) AS number, -- COALESCE( -- ala.hr_total, -- 如果 ala.hr_total 不为 NULL，则使用它的值 -- CASE -- WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN -- alal.work_number -- ELSE -- alal.number -- END -- ) AS number, -- CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' or alaL.leave_type = '年假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END as number, -- alal.number, -- ala.total_number, alal.leave_type, 0 AS reviewhours, 99 AS xxrbs FROM ac_leave_application ala JOIN ac_leave_application_line alal ON ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version WHERE YEAR (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND ala.approval_result = 'Pass' UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 7 ), aoal.start_time, 120 ) AS formatted_month, aoal.nick_name, aoal.user_name, 0 AS txts, '加班' AS LeaveType, ROUND(aoal.review_hours, 1) AS review_hours, -- aoal.review_hours, c.XXRBS FROM ac_overtime_application aoa JOIN ac_overtime_application_line aoal ON aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c.RQ, C.XXRBS FROM v_kq_date c ) c ON CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), aoal.review_startTime, 23 ) = c.RQ WHERE YEAR (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND aoa.approval_result = 'Pass') a JOIN pm_employee pe ON a.user_name = pe.work_card LEFT JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_dept fds ON fds.id = pej.dept_id where (fds.ext_dept_id = #{deptId}) and pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND a.nick_name != '' GROUP BY a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, pej.attribute2, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pej.job_name,fds.ext_dept_id,fds.ext_department_id,fds.ext_team_id order by a.formatted_month desc OFFSET (#{pages}) * #{sizes} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{sizes} ROWS ONLY

SELECT pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card, fd.dept_name as dept_name, aopr.id, aopr.dept_id, aopr.section_id FROM ac_overtime_personnel_review aopr JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = aopr.dept_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.work_card = aopr.work_card WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 and aopr.id = #{id}
select fd.dept_name as section_name from fnd_dept fd where fd.id = #{sectionId} and fd.enabled_flag = 1

SELECT pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card, fd.dept_name as dept_name, aopr.id, aopr.dept_id, aopr.section_id FROM ac_overtime_personnel_review aopr JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = aopr.dept_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.work_card = aopr.work_card WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 and aopr.section_id is null

SELECT pe.name as name, pe.work_card as work_card, fd.dept_name as dept_name, '' as section_name, aopr.id, aopr.dept_id, aopr.section_id FROM ac_overtime_personnel_review aopr JOIN fnd_dept fd ON fd.id = aopr.dept_id JOIN pm_employee pe ON pe.work_card = aopr.work_card WHERE pe.leave_flag = 0 and aopr.section_id is null and pe.work_card = #{workCard}
select TOP 1 fd.id from fnd_dept fd where fd.dept_name like #{workCard} and fd.enabled_flag = 1

SELECT a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_dept_id = fdt.id ) AS dept_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_department_id = fdt.id ) AS section_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_team_id = fdt.id ) AS group_name, pej.job_name, SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 0 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END) workDayOvertime, SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 1 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END) restDayOvertime, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END), 2) TXTS, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) * 7.5, 2) AS TXXS, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '年假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) NJ, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '事假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END),2) SJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '病假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) BJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '婚假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) CJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '陪产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) PCJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '丧假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) SAJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '工伤假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GSJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '计划生育假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) JHSYJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '公假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '育儿假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) YEJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '护理假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HLJ FROM (SELECT CONVERT (VARCHAR (7), alal.start_time, 120) AS formatted_month, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, (CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END) AS number, -- COALESCE( -- ala.hr_total, -- 如果 ala.hr_total 不为 NULL，则使用它的值 -- CASE -- WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN -- alal.work_number -- ELSE -- alal.number -- END -- ) AS number, -- CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' or alaL.leave_type = '年假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END as number, -- alal.number, -- ala.total_number, alal.leave_type, 0 AS reviewhours, 99 AS xxrbs FROM ac_leave_application ala JOIN ac_leave_application_line alal ON ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version WHERE YEAR (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND ala.approval_result = 'Pass' UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 7 ), aoal.start_time, 120 ) AS formatted_month, aoal.nick_name, aoal.user_name, 0 AS txts, '加班' AS LeaveType, ROUND(aoal.review_hours, 1) AS review_hours, -- aoal.review_hours, c.XXRBS FROM ac_overtime_application aoa JOIN ac_overtime_application_line aoal ON aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c.RQ, C.XXRBS FROM v_kq_date c ) c ON CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), aoal.review_startTime, 23 ) = c.RQ WHERE YEAR (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND aoa.approval_result = 'Pass') a JOIN pm_employee pe ON a.user_name = pe.work_card LEFT JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_dept fds ON fds.id = pej.dept_id where (fds.ext_dept_id = #{deptId} AND fds.ext_department_id = #{administrativeOfficeId} AND fds.ext_team_id = #{groupsId}) and pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND a.nick_name != '' GROUP BY a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, pej.attribute2, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pej.job_name,fds.ext_dept_id,fds.ext_department_id,fds.ext_team_id order by a.formatted_month desc OFFSET (#{pages}) * #{sizes} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{sizes} ROWS ONLY

SELECT a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_dept_id = fdt.id ) AS dept_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_department_id = fdt.id ) AS section_name, ( SELECT dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fds.ext_team_id = fdt.id ) AS group_name, pej.job_name, SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 0 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END) workDayOvertime, SUM(CASE WHEN a.xxrbs = 1 THEN a.reviewhours ELSE 0 END) restDayOvertime, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END), 2) TXTS, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '调休' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) * 7.5, 2) AS TXXS, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '年假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) NJ, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '事假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END),2) SJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '病假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) BJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '婚假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) CJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '陪产假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) PCJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '丧假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) SAJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '工伤假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GSJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '计划生育假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) JHSYJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '公假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) GJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '育儿假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) YEJ, SUM(CASE WHEN a.leave_type = '护理假' THEN a.number ELSE 0 END) HLJ FROM (SELECT CONVERT (VARCHAR (7), alal.start_time, 120) AS formatted_month, ala.nick_name, ala.user_name, (CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END) AS number, -- COALESCE( -- ala.hr_total, -- 如果 ala.hr_total 不为 NULL，则使用它的值 -- CASE -- WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' OR alal.leave_type = '年假' OR alal.leave_type = '调休' OR alal.leave_type = '病假' THEN -- alal.work_number -- ELSE -- alal.number -- END -- ) AS number, -- CASE WHEN alal.leave_type = '事假' or alaL.leave_type = '年假' THEN alal.work_number ELSE alal.number END as number, -- alal.number, -- ala.total_number, alal.leave_type, 0 AS reviewhours, 99 AS xxrbs FROM ac_leave_application ala JOIN ac_leave_application_line alal ON ala.oa_order = alal.oa_order and ala.version = alal.version WHERE YEAR (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (start_time) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND ala.approval_result = 'Pass' UNION ALL SELECT CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 7 ), aoal.start_time, 120 ) AS formatted_month, aoal.nick_name, aoal.user_name, 0 AS txts, '加班' AS LeaveType, ROUND(aoal.review_hours, 1) AS review_hours, -- aoal.review_hours, c.XXRBS FROM ac_overtime_application aoa JOIN ac_overtime_application_line aoal ON aoa.oa_order = aoal.oa_order LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c.RQ, C.XXRBS FROM v_kq_date c ) c ON CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), aoal.review_startTime, 23 ) = c.RQ WHERE YEAR (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 1 , 4) AS INT) AND MONTH (aoal.review_startTime) = CAST (SUBSTRING (#{checkMonth} , 6 , 2) AS INT) AND aoa.approval_result = 'Pass') a JOIN pm_employee pe ON a.user_name = pe.work_card LEFT JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pej.employee_id = pe.id INNER JOIN fnd_dept fds ON fds.id = pej.dept_id where pe.work_card = #{workCard} and pej.job_main_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND a.nick_name != '' GROUP BY a.formatted_month, a.nick_name, a.user_name, pej.attribute2, pej.dept_name, pej.attribute4, pej.job_name,fds.ext_dept_id,fds.ext_department_id,fds.ext_team_id order by a.formatted_month desc OFFSET (#{pages}) * #{sizes} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{sizes} ROWS ONLY
order by id
SELECT DISTINCT fd.ext_dept_id FROM fnd_dept fd WHERE fd.admin_job_id = ( SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM pm_employee_job AS pej WHERE pej.employee_id = #{id} AND enabled_flag = 1 AND job_main_flag = 1 )
mapper.sql: where 1 = 1 AND (aoa.approval_result = 'Pass' or aoa.approval_result = 'pass') AND aoal.review_endTime IS NULL AND ( aoal.end_time >= DATEADD( MONTH, - 1, GETDATE( ) ) AND aoal.end_time <= DATEADD( MONTH, 1, GETDATE( ) ) ) AND ( ( aoa.user_department LIKE #{userDepartment} AND aoa.user_section LIKE #{userSection} ) OR ( aoa.user_department LIKE #{userDepartment} ) )

select
from ac_overtime_application aoa join ac_overtime_application_line aoal
